name: Asfi Al Andromeda
alt_names: アスフィ・アル・アンドロメダ
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ 164 cm (5'5")
__Affiliation:__ Hermes Familia
__Level:__ 4
__Magic:__ Kalov Argol
__Weapon:__ Canoval Dagger

Asfi Al Andromeda is a member and the captain of the Hermes Familia. She is also one of the most famous item makers in Orario, known as Perseus. Asfi was the princess of an island nation that was stolen by a God. At some point, she was taken away by Hermes and became an adventurer and a member of his Familia.

Asfi is serious and will follow Hermes' orders. She is a hard worker that is often pushed around by Hermes. Welf states that she may come from royalty somewhere due to her behavior, and in truth, she is the princess of a maritime nation.

(Source: Danmachi Wiki)
